notes: The file provides a CoordHom-free base-change of an arbitrary function-field endomorphism via the 'Twist' type-synonym machinery plus Module.finrank_baseChange, culminating in a concrete pullback_L for the 1−π isogeny. The finrankBaseChange proof (105 lines, maxHeartbeats 1600000) is the mathematical core: it explicitly constructs a LinearEquiv between (L⊗K(C))⊗_{K(C)} Twist f and Twist(id_L⊗f) by giving both forward and inverse maps with inductive verification. No sorries; all declarations are axiom-clean.
